nasb.text: Then all the people, both small and great, and the captains of the forces arose and went to Egypt; for they were afraid of the Chaldeans.

esv.text: Then all the people, both small and great, and the captains of the forces arose and went to Egypt, for they were afraid of the Chaldeans.

cnv.text: 因此，眾民無論大小，以及眾將領都起來逃往埃及去，因為他們懼怕迦勒底人。

ccb.text: 因为害怕迦勒底人报复，犹大众人不论贵贱，都和众将领一起逃往埃及。
